title: Living with Depression 2002
description: An online survey on depression, conducted by a Finnish newspaper. The data consist of responses to some open-ended questions in the questionnaire. Questions covered other people's reactions to the respondents' depression, and the impact of depression on children, work and life in general. Worst moments of depression were also described. The dataset is only available in Finnish.
license: In accordance with the agreement between FSD and the depositor.
